objective: Normalize a full-history local CSIndex 000985 daily series into a governed MARKET price-index proxy without claiming total-return evidence.
forbidden: Do not describe the CSIndex close series as an official total-return index.
Do not run IC, RankIC, hit rate, state performance validation, portfolio backtest, NAV, Sharpe, annualized return, or model promotion.
Do not claim dividend-inclusive or investable total-return performance from a price-index proxy.
acceptance_criteria: Primary 000985 proxy has at least 5000 regular trading rows.
Primary 000985 proxy starts no later than 20050104 and ends no earlier than 20260501.
The written proxy file clearly marks return_basis_candidate as price_index_return.
Official total-return source remains absent and untouched.
failure_conditions: The official total-return file is created.
The proxy file omits the price-index/not-total-return governance fields.
Any performance metric output is produced.
quality_gates: AST, JSON, and import checks pass.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: backtest_validation_auditor may implement V3.59 guarded price-proxy label importer only as a separate non-official validation track.
